89 B0600_SPCH_CLRTY_CD B0600_SPCH_CLRTY_CD B0600 Speech Clarity Code CHAR 1 The data in this column describes the resident's speech pattern. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Clear Speech-distinct intelligible words
1=Unclear speech-slurred or mumbled words
2=No speech-absence of spoken word
^=Blank(skip pattern)
